mapper.select: SELECT r.*, p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, p.id_card, p.phone, d.dept_name, u.real_name as doctor_name FROM registration r LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN department d ON r.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.doctor_id = u.user_id WHERE r.reg_id = #{regId}

SELECT r.*, p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, p.id_card, p.phone, d.dept_name, u.real_name as doctor_name FROM registration r LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN department d ON r.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.doctor_id = u.user_id WHERE r.reg_no = #{regNo}

SELECT r.*, p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, p.id_card, p.phone, d.dept_name, u.real_name as doctor_name FROM registration r LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN department d ON r.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.doctor_id = u.user_id WHERE r.doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND r.reg_date = #{regDate} AND r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.queue_number

SELECT r.*, p.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.gender, p.age, d.dept_name, u.real_name as doctor_name FROM registration r LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN department d ON r.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.doctor_id = u.user_id WHERE r.patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (reg_no, patient_id, dept_id, doctor_id, reg_level, reg_date, time_slot, reg_fee, status, queue_number, charge_user_id) VALUES (#{regNo}, #{patientId}, #{deptId}, #{doctorId}, #{regLevel}, #{regDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{regFee}, #{status}, #{queueNumber}, #{chargeUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE registration SET status = #{status} WHERE reg_id = #{regId}
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(queue_number), 0) FROM registration WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND reg_date = #{regDate} AND time_slot = #{timeSlot}
